terms.definition: Factorization A = U Σ Vᵀ with orthogonal U and V and non-negative diagonal singular values in Σ.
Non-negative diagonal entry σᵢ in Σ measuring how much A stretches the corresponding right singular direction.
Column of U; an orthonormal direction in the output space paired with a singular value.
Column of V; an orthonormal direction in the input space; eigenvector of AᵀA for non-zero σᵢ.
Approximation using only the top k singular values and associated singular vectors for low-rank compression.
